candidate_a.title: Cloud Scribes
candidate_a.target_user: Visual artists seeking cooperative abstract outlet
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Digital art being solitary by design
candidate_a.core_concept: A painting tool that forces cooperative constraint, where one user can only define the line curvature while the other holds exclusive rights to color saturation selection.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Sync-based 'Duel Painting' rounds where a single artifact cannot progress unless both parties contribute concurrently over 60 seconds.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Two-user concurrent drawing interface demonstrating synchronization logic for one shared layer.

candidate_b.title: Cloud Scribes
candidate_b.target_user: Visual artists seeking cooperative abstract outlet
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Digital art being solitary by design
candidate_b.core_concept: Cooperative drawing tool with forced constraints.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A drawing app where two users must coordinate to create a single image, with one controlling line and the other controlling color.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A two-user concurrent drawing interface demonstrating basic synchronization logic for one shared layer. | Implement basic drawing canvas; Build simple networking for two-user sync; Define line and color control roles

candidate_a.title: Remote Cultural Consultant Tooling
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Churn due to poor communication onboarding in distributed digital agencies
candidate_a.core_concept: Interactive, asynchronous onboarding playbooks for remote teams.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A service providing modular, interactive PDF/Notion playbooks for remote team onboarding.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Three modular playbooks delivered as interactive documents. | Design 3 modular playbooks.; Format as interactive documents.; Test with 3 remote startups.; Gather feedback on usability.

candidate_b.title: Remote Cultural Consultant Tooling
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Churn due to poor communication onboarding in distributed digital agencies
candidate_b.core_concept: Pre-composed interactive playbooks that teams execute during onboarding asynchronously
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Interactive documentation SaaS measuring engagement speed through team progress reports
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Three modular asynchronous playbooks delivered in interactive documentation files

candidate_a.title: Vertical Hyper-Growth Greens Box
candidate_a.target_user: Small households living without access to light
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Fresh, raw herbs losing structural viability within days of shop delivery
candidate_a.core_concept: Live, harvestable herbs in the kitchen.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A subscription for pre-grown, potted herbs that are replaced weekly.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Deliver 20 potted herbs to 15 kitchens and replace them weekly for one month. | Source 20 potted herbs; Recruit 15 households; Execute weekly delivery/replacement; Measure herb survival and user satisfaction

candidate_b.title: Vertical Hyper-Growth Greens Box
candidate_b.target_user: Small households living without access to light
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Fresh, raw herbs losing structural viability within days of shop delivery
candidate_b.core_concept: Live subscription of micro-planters moved directly from industrial shelf to kitchen counter
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Retail unit which features replaceable harvest substrate cassettes specifically designed for light-starved indoor kitchens
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Installation of 20 live harvesting modules into resident fridges testing herb survival across fifteen separate kitchens

candidate_a.title: Coffee Rental & Skill Development Platform
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: High barrier to entry regarding technical manual pour-over hardware acquisition costs
candidate_a.core_concept: Trial-based access to premium coffee brewing equipment with guided technique support.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A rental service for manual brewing equipment (e.g., V60, Chemex) paired with a digital guide or video tutorial for the user.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A 30-day rental program for 5 users using 2 types of manual brewing rigs. | Acquire 5 sets of manual brewing equipment.; Create a simple PDF/video guide for each rig.; Run a 30-day pilot with 5 local users.

candidate_b.title: Coffee Rental & Skill Development Platform
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: High barrier to entry regarding technical manual pour-over hardware acquisition costs
candidate_b.core_concept: Circularity economy platform for premium coffee equipment trial with integrated technique support
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Temporary hardware consignment model featuring high-end devices like automatic pulse pour-over drippers
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Testing a thirty-day rental loop with five local residential customers using two popular brewing rigs

candidate_a.title: Professional Field Brew Station Repair Service
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Machine downtime disproportionately impacting revenue during slow maintenance call-outs from established vendors
candidate_a.core_concept: Rapid-response modular machine heart swaps and standardized component library to reduce technical failure periods
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Aggregator of independent master electricians trained in industry equipment, utilizing modular chassis exchange rather than deep in-store diagnostics
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Testing speed-to-solution with five broken commercial devices by delivering serviced, reconditioned replacement module parts

candidate_b.title: Professional Field Brew Station Repair Service
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Machine downtime disproportionately impacting revenue during slow maintenance call-outs from established vendors
candidate_b.core_concept: Rapid-response repair service using modular swaps to minimize downtime.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A repair service that stocks common replacement parts for popular machines to offer faster turnaround times than traditional vendors.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A pilot repair service for 5 local cafes focusing on one common machine brand. | Identify 5 cafes using the same machine brand.; Stock common parts for that brand.; Offer a 24-hour repair guarantee for those cafes.
